paper_title: Language Models Can See: Plugging Visual Controls in Text Generation

methodology.description: A novel text decoding scheme that inserts a CLIP-induced term called 'magic score' in the next token search
features: Uses explicit 'control knobs' to select desired outputs
No additional training or parameters needed during inference
Guides decoding process using both GPT-2 and CLIP models

achievements: State-of-the-art (SOTA) performance across different evaluation metrics

title: Language Models Can See: Plugging Visual Controls in Text Generation
